\"Jo+í otvoren\")</dd>\n-    <dt>Status</dt>\n-    <dd>@Model.Status</dd>\n-    <dt>Kilometra++a pri servisu</dt>\n-    <dd>@Model.KilometrazaPrilikomServisa.ToString(\"N0\") km</dd>\n-    <dt>Opis radova</dt>\n-    <dd>@Model.OpisRadova</dd>\n-    <dt>Napomena</dt>\n-    <dd>@(Model.Napomena ?? \"-\")</dd>\n-    <dt>Sljede-çi preporu-ìeni pregled</dt>\n-    <dd>@(Model.SljedecaPreporucenaPregleda?.ToString(\"dd.MM.yyyy\") ?? \"-\")</dd>\n-    <dt>Ukupna cijena</dt>\n-    <dd><strong>@Model.UkupnaCijena.ToString(\"N2\") Gé¼</strong></dd>\n-</dl>\n-\n-@if (Model.Stavke != null && Model.Stavke.Any())\n-{\n-    <h4>Ugra-æeni dijelovi</h4>\n-    <table class=\"table\">\n-        <thead>\n-            <tr>\n-                <th>Dio</th>\n-                <th>Koli-ìina</th>\n-                <th>Cijena/kom</th>\n-                <th>Ukupno</th>\n-                <th>Napomena</th>\n-            </tr>\n-        </thead>\n-        <tbody>\n-            @foreach (var stavka in Model.Stavke)\n-            {\n-                <tr>\n-                    <td>@(stavka.Dio?.Naziv ?? $\"Dio #{stavka.DioId}\")</td>\n-                    <td>@stavka.Kolicina</td>\n-                    <td>@stavka.CijenaKomad.ToString(\"N2\") Gé¼</td>\n-                    <td>@stavka.UkupnaCijenaStavke.ToString(\"N2\") Gé¼</td>\n-                    <td>@(stavka.Napomena ?? \"-\")</td>\n-                </tr>\n-            }\n-        </tbody>\n-    </table>\n-}\n+<section class=\"entity-shell\">\n+    <div class=\"entity-head\">\n+        <h2>Servisni nalog #@Model.Id</h2>\n+    </div>\n+\n+    <div class=\"detail-card mb-4\">\n+        <dl class=\"row mb-0\">\n+            <dt class=\"col-sm-4\">Vozilo</dt>\n+            <dd class=\"col-sm-8\">\n+                @if (Model.Automobil != null)\n+                {\n+                    <a asp-controller=\"Automobil\" asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-id=\"@Model.AutomobilId\">@Model.Automobil.Naziv</a>\n+                }\n+            </dd>\n+            <dt class=\"col-sm-4\">Mehani-ìar</dt>\n+            <dd class=\"col-sm-8\">\n+                @if (Model.Mehanicar != null)\n+                {\n+                    <a asp-controller=\"Mehanicar\" asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-id=\"@Model.MehanicarId\">@Model.Mehanicar.PunoIme</a>\n+                }\n+            </dd>\n+            <dt class=\"col-sm-4\">Datum otvaranja</dt>\n+            <dd class=\"col-sm-8\">@Model.DatumOtvaranja.ToString(\"dd.MM.yyyy\")</dd>\n+            <dt class=\"col-sm-4\">Datum zatvaranja</dt>\n+            <dd class=\"col-sm-8\">@(Model.DatumZatvaranja?.ToString(\"dd.MM.yyyy\") ??
